title: Luzama mentosa
intro:
I couldn't find any information about the plant "Luzama mentosa." However, I did find some information about the plant "Lavandula angustifolia" (Lavender), but I also found "Luzama" sounds similar to a plant called "Luzuriaga", but that too does not have much information. 

But I think you might be referring to "Luzuriaga" (a genus of flowering plants), specifically "Luzuriaga parviflora" or "Luzuriaga radicans" (these are both a member of the Luzuriaga genus), or another plant "Luzuriaga marginata" with "Luzuriaga radicans" having an alternate name of Luzama radicans, which is a plant in the family Colchicaceae.
uses: I couldn't find any information on a plant called Luzama mentosa.
side_effects: Unfortunately, I couldn't find any information on Luzama mentosa.
